name: analytics
purpose: Counts, comparisons, simple ratios, and rankings over FHIR-derived results.
instructions: For counts and comparisons, show the number and the evidence basis.
Use the calculator tool for arithmetic instead of freehand arithmetic when possible.
Prefer tables or ranked lists when comparing categories.
domainContext: Analytics is for derived values, not for narrative summaries.
Do not hide the denominator when you state a percentage or rate.
